friendly_name: Auth Local Trust And Multi-Process Hardening
purpose_context: This mission closes remaining CLI auth-adjacent trust gaps after the shipped browser/device OAuth work: logged-out Teamspace guidance, direct-ingress error classification, broad-exception guardrails, hosted-env-safe refresh-lock tests, and a durable encrypted-file-rooted local session hot-path design.
purpose_tldr: Make CLI hosted-auth and tracker-bound workflows fail truthfully, test hermetically, and behave reliably under local multi-process use.
